_comment: OFFLINE translation table for the demo Localizer — keeps the loop provable with zero external calls (the 'generic/template first' path). In the real loop you delete this and point the bridge at the live provider (Workers AI via cloud, or DeepL): scripts/localize-shots.mjs --provider. Keyed by source English text, then by target locale. ShipASO (a brandToken) is intentionally kept verbatim in every locale — the engine masks it before translating.

Prove your rank moved.de-DE: Beweise, dass sich dein Ranking verändert hat
Prove your rank moved.fr-FR: Prouvez que votre classement a bougé
Prove your rank moved.it-IT: Dimostra che il tuo posizionamento è cambiato

Track keyword rankings before and after.es-ES: Sigue las posiciones de tus palabras clave antes y después de cada cambio
Track keyword rankings before and after.de-DE: Verfolge die Keyword-Rankings vor und nach jeder Änderung
Track keyword rankings before and after.fr-FR: Suivez le classement de vos mots-clés avant et après chaque modification
Track keyword rankings before and after.pt-BR: Acompanhe a posição das palavras-chave antes e depois de cada mudança
Track keyword rankings before and after.it-IT: Monitora il posizionamento delle parole chiave prima e dopo ogni modifica
